# Data Model: Access Fail-Closed Completeness (M-B)

**Mission**: `access-fail-closed-completeness-01KS3RJT`
**Date**: 2026-05-20

This mission introduces no new database entities. Data-shape changes are limited to:
1. A new plain-text file format (`tools/getquery-bindings-baseline.txt`).
2. Internal state of `RecordingEntityQuery` (test helper, never persisted).

---

## Baseline File Format

**Path**: `tools/getquery-bindings-baseline.txt`

```
# Baseline: getQuery() bindings exempt from CI gate
# Format: <relative-path-from-repo-root>:<line>  # <mandatory-exemption-reason>
# Generated by: php bin/check-getquery-bindings --generate-baseline
# Last generated: <ISO date>
#
# Rules:
# - One entry per offending callsite.
# - Entries sorted: path ascending, then line number ascending.
# - Every entry MUST have an inline comment explaining why the callsite is exempt.
# - A callsite without a comment will be flagged by the CI gate as incomplete.
# - To add a new exemption: append <path>:<line>  # <reason>, then run
#   "php bin/check-getquery-bindings --verify" to confirm CI passes.

packages/path/src/PathAliasResolver.php:47  # system-context: path aliases have no per-user ACL
packages/seo/src/SitemapGenerator.php:83    # system-context: sitemap generation is always anonymous
```

**Sort order**: `sort -t: -k1,1 -k2,2n` (path lexicographic, then line numeric).

**Comment requirement**: Any entry without a `# <reason>` comment is treated as an incomplete baseline entry and causes the CI gate to exit non-zero with a descriptive error.

---

## RecordingEntityQuery Internal Shape

```php
// packages/entity/testing/RecordingEntityQuery.php
final class RecordingEntityQuery implements EntityQueryInterface
{
    /** @var list<bool> Each recorded accessCheck() call value, in call order. */
    public array $accessChecks = [];

    /** @var ?AccountInterface The last account bound via setAccount(), or null if never called. */
    public ?AccountInterface $boundAccount = null;

    /** @var list<int|string> Stubbed execute() return value; override via withResults(). */
    private array $stubbedResults = [];

    // ... (full implementation in contracts/RecordingEntityQuery-contract.md)
}
```

**State transitions**:
- `accessCheck(bool $check)` → appends `$check` to `$accessChecks`, returns `$this`.
- `setAccount(?AccountInterface $account)` → sets `$boundAccount = $account`, returns `$this`.
- `execute()` → returns `$stubbedResults` (default `[]`).
- `withResults(array $ids)` → sets `$stubbedResults`, returns `$this` (fluent test helper).
- All other methods (`condition`, `exists`, `notExists`, `sort`, `range`, `count`) → return `$this`, no side effects.

---

## No New Database Entities

Confirmed: no new tables, no entity-type registrations, no schema migrations in this mission.
